_meta.name: OUTRAGE — Performance Sync
_meta.description: Runs daily at noon. Fetches engagement metrics for published posts from social platform APIs. POSTs metrics to /api/webhooks/performance.
_notes: Requires social API credentials per platform.
Instagram: Facebook Graph API (requires Business account + approved access).
TikTok: TikTok Display API or TikTok for Business API.
Twitter/X: Twitter API v2 (Basic tier needed for post metrics).
For now, these are stubs — replace with real API calls as you set up credentials.

nodes.name: Load Recent Post Results
nodes._comment: Get posts from last 7 days that have external platform IDs
